title: phalangium liliago subsp. baeticum
intro: Phalangium liliago subsp. baeticum, also known as the Baeticic phalangium, is a subspecies of the plant Phalangium liliago. However I can't find any information on this plant, I can only suggest that the actual name of the plant is Phlomis liliifolia subsp. baeticum which is a subspecies of the perennial herb Phlomis liliifolia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlomis liliifolia subsp. baeticum include the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, and herbal preparations often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from its leaves and stems.
